speaker: speaker1
text: Come on , you are left behind !

speaker: speaker2
text: Wow , I can't catch my breath . You are running too fast , honey .

speaker: speaker2
text: Yes , but you need to slow down . This is jogging , not racing !

speaker: speaker1
text: I don't care . I want to burn up my fat .

speaker: speaker2
text: But running so fast is not good for people over forties .

speaker: speaker2
text: We are not as athletic as we were when young . Mild exercise is more suitable for us .

speaker: speaker1
text: But I want to burn up more calories !

speaker: speaker2
text: In fact , in order to burn up your fat , you must take it slowly for a longer time .

speaker: speaker1
text: Really ? I will slow down then .
